title: Mask token tracking to map area
description: Ensure token tracking only occurs for tokens within the designated map area. Tokens visible to the camera that fall outside the active map boundaries should be filtered or masked out to prevent interference and improve performance.
close_reason: Implemented map bounds masking in TokenFilter and updated TrackingCoordinator to pass SVG dimensions.

title: Implement Caching for SVG Map Rendering
description: Implement a caching mechanism for rendered SVG viewports. Quantize parameters like zoom and pan to maximize cache hits. This should eliminate render spikes for complex maps during static viewing.
close_reason: Implemented pan quantization for SVG caching

title: Task: Refactor Detectors to use FrameProducer and ResultQueue
description:
Refactor ArucoDetector and HandDetector into standalone worker functions suitable for multiprocessing.

Requirements:
1. Implement 'aruco_worker(shm_name, results_queue, lock, stop_event, ...)' and 'hands_worker(...)'.
2. Use FrameProducer within the worker to acquire the latest frame.
3. Implementation must follow the 'Acquire -> Process -> Release' lifecycle strictly to prevent SHM buffer exhaustion.
4. Implement frame-dropping: if the detector is busy, it should skip frames to ensure zero-latency on the most recent result.
5. Serialize results into 'DetectionResult' objects and push to the shared 'results_queue'.
6. Handle 'stop_event' for graceful process termination.
close_reason: Refactored Aruco and Hand detectors into standalone workers

title: Task: Implement MainLoopController and InputManager refactor
description: Implement the high-frequency event aggregator and the unified, context-aware InputManager.
close_reason: InputManager refactored to unify keyboard and gesture inputs with semantic action mapping.

title: Critical Review: Algorithm Accuracy and Structural Integrity
description: Perform a deep-dive review of the whitepaper to ensure it accurately reflects the implemented algorithms in the code. Verify the abstract, introduction, and conclusion are precise and comprehensive.
close_reason: Reviewed codebase to ensure algorithms match whitepaper descriptions. Corrected calibration workflow order in main.tex and plan.md to reflect proper dependency chain (PPI before Extrinsics).

title: Bug: Token circle and label size/positioning
description: The circle drawn around the token position is too small. The diameter should be 2 inches (radius = 1 inch = PPI pixels) regardless of the grid cell size. The label position should be updated accordingly to account for the larger radius.
close_reason: Updated token circle radius to be exactly 1 inch (PPI pixels), regardless of grid cell size. Adjusted label positioning and visual tests accordingly.

title: Critical Review of Whitepaper: Accuracy and Structure
description: Perform a critical review of the whitepaper to ensure it is accurate to the implemented algorithm in the code. Ensure it has an accurate abstract, intro, and conclusions.

title: Refactor HandMaskLayer: Delegate geometry logic to HandMasker

close_reason: Completed full refactor of rendering layers for SRP and separation of concerns.

title: Epic: Refactor Rendering Layers for Separation of Concerns
description: Refactor overloaded rendering layers to adhere to SRP. Move state management, coordinate transforms, and complex logic to dedicated managers/workers.
close_reason: Completed full refactor of rendering layers for SRP and separation of concerns.

title: Renderer uses floating-point alpha blending instead of integer math
description: The current Renderer implementation converts all LayerMode.NORMAL patches to float32 for blending. This is unnecessary and resource-intensive. It should use integer math (fixed-point arithmetic) for better performance.
close_reason: Implemented integer-based alpha blending in Renderer, improving performance by ~22% while maintaining correctness.

title: Epic: Remote Application Driver (Light-Map WebDriver)
description: Implement a remote control protocol and driver to automate the application for end-to-end testing and remote orchestration. Similar to WebDriver, this should allow programmatic injection of gestures, map loading commands, and state verification.
close_reason: Implementation complete and verified with E2E tests.

title: Web Calibration Wizards
description: Implement the step-by-step UI for Intrinsic, Extrinsic, and Projector-Camera calibration in the dashboard, using the video stream for feedback.
close_reason: Implemented CalibrationWizard React component and updated backend to route calibration POST actions to the corresponding scenes.

title: Task: Modularize SVGLoader into light_map.svg package

close_reason: Modularized SVGLoader into a dedicated light_map.svg package. Separated concerns into loader, renderer, geometry, blockers, and utils. Verified all 19 tests pass.

title: Implement SceneLayer wrapper
Fix layer visibility and scene interference

close_reason: Optimized map matrix caching, hand mask padding via drawContours, and bitwise boolean mask application.

close_reason: Implemented draw_text_with_background helper and updated all token-related UI elements to use it for better readability.

title: Bug: Token names rendered above instead of below

title: Task: Support SVG Clipping and Masking

close_reason: Implemented support for SVG clip-path using OpenCV masks and bitwise operations. Supports nested clipping and arbitrary shapes.

title: Hide mouse pointer during application execution

title: Fix visibility and FoW misalignment when grid origin is non-zero

close_reason: Implemented fix and verified with tests.

title: Update WorldState with component timestamps
description: Add timestamps for map, menu, calibration, and tokens to WorldState in core/world_state.py

title: Fix IPC Race Condition in FrameProducer
description: FrameProducer.get_latest_frame() and get_latest_timestamp() read 'latest_id' from shared memory outside of the lock. This can lead to acquiring a lease on a buffer while the producer is updating it, causing data corruption or crashes.
close_reason: Multiprocessing refactor completed and verified. Legacy code cleaned up. IPC race conditions resolved via shared lock management.

title: Task: Support Dashed and Dotted Lines in SVG Rendering
description: Implement support for 'stroke-dasharray' to allow dashed lines for secret doors and elevation changes.
close_reason: Implemented support for stroke-dasharray in SVGLoader.renderer using manual segmentation since OpenCV polylines does not support dashes.

title: Complete VisionProcessManager (Process Lifecycle and Lock Sharing)
description:
Finalize the supervisor class in 'src/light_map/vision/process_manager.py'.

Requirements:
1. Initialize a single 'multiprocessing.Lock' to share between CameraOperator and all FrameProducer instances.
2. Spawn 'ArucoDetector' and 'HandDetector' workers as daemon processes.
3. Pass the shared SHM segment name, Lock, ResultsQueue, and StopEvent to all workers.
4. Implement a non-blocking 'is_healthy()' check to monitor process status.
5. Ensure 'stop()' correctly signals workers and joins/kills them before unlinking SHM.
close_reason: Completed VisionProcessManager with workers

title: Integrate MainLoopController into InteractiveApp and hand_tracker.py
description:
Refactor the application entry points to use the new multiprocessing architecture.

Requirements:
1. Update 'InteractiveApp' to utilize the 'MainLoopController' for state aggregation and action dispatch.
2. Refactor 'hand_tracker.py' to initialize 'VisionProcessManager' and 'MainLoopController' instead of the legacy 'CameraPipeline'.
3. Decouple rendering from the camera pipeline to ensure it only occurs when 'WorldState' is dirty or an Action is received.
4. Ensure 'VisionProcessManager.stop()' is called on shutdown or exception.
close_reason: Integrated MainLoopController into hand_tracker and InteractiveApp

title: Optimize rendering performance by making FOW, Visibility, and Door layers static
description: The FogOfWarLayer, VisibilityLayer, and DoorLayer were non-static, causing them to be re-composited every frame during token movement, even if the vision state didn't change. Making them static allows the renderer to cache them in the background_cache, significantly improving FPS (from ~8 to ~90).
close_reason: Optimized performance by making layers static and verified with profiling script.

title: Tests polluting user configuration with 'test_map' entries
description: Running tests (specifically 'test_scan_normalization_fix.py') adds 'test_map.svg' entries to the user's ~/.config/light_map/map_state.json. This is because InteractiveApp and MapConfigManager are instantiated without a mock StorageManager in some tests, causing them to fall back to the default production storage paths. Tests should use a temporary directory for all storage operations.
close_reason: Fixed by updating multiple test files (test_scan_normalization_fix.py, test_token_count_display.py, test_unknown_token_visuals.py, test_interactive_app_scenes.py, test_interactive_app_render_regression.py, test_interactive_app_masking.py) to use a temporary StorageManager via the tmp_path fixture. This prevents tests from falling back to production XDG paths and polluting the user's ~/.config/light_map/map_state.json file.

close_reason: Implemented watertight pixel-based visibility engine with corner peeking and mask-centric API

title: Epic: Refactor Renderer into a Layered Composition System
description: Transition the current monolithic Renderer into a layered system where each layer (Map, Tokens, Menu, UI) can independently decide to re-render based on granular WorldState dirty flags. This will improve performance by avoiding full redraws when only small parts of the state change.
close_reason: done

title: Optimize layer rendering with change detection
description: Adjust the Layer API to support change detection (e.g., via timestamps or dirty flags). Only layers with detected changes should re-render. If no global state changes occur, skip the entire rendering pipeline to minimize CPU/GPU usage.
close_reason: done

title: Epic: SVG Wall Support for Fog of War and Visibility
description: Brainstorm and implement support for walls encoded in SVG maps to enable Fog of War and line-of-sight visibility logic. This involves defining SVG conventions, path parsing, and a visibility engine.

title: Epic: Web-Based Control Interface
description: Implements a React-based dashboard served via FastAPI to manage system settings (tokens, maps) and provide real-time spatial control. Design documented in features/web_control_interface.md.
close_reason: Epic completed and reviewed.

title: Scaffold React application (Vite + Tailwind CSS)
description: Set up the frontend directory with a modern React boilerplate and Tailwind CSS configuration.
close_reason: Completed scaffolding the React frontend with Vite, Tailwind CSS, ESLint, and Prettier. Initial dashboard layout and directory structure are in place.

title: Extend Remote Driver for WebSocket and static serving
description: Implement the /ws/state endpoint and static file serving in src/light_map/vision/remote_driver.py.
close_reason: Successfully extended the Remote Driver to support WebSocket state broadcasting and static file serving for the React frontend. Implemented a robust ConnectionManager and used the FastAPI lifespan pattern for background tasks. Verified with comprehensive integration tests.

title: Implement real-time State Sync Hook
description: Create a React hook that connects to the /ws/state WebSocket and provides the system state globally.
close_reason: Implemented the real-time state sync hook and context provider. The hook manages the WebSocket connection with automatic reconnection and broadcasts state updates to the entire app. Integrated visual status indicators into the Dashboard. Verified with comprehensive tests.

title: Build Interactive Canvas with Draggable Grid
description: Implement the SVG-based canvas with panning/zooming and a draggable grid layer for spatial calibration.
close_reason: Successfully implemented the interactive SVG canvas with pan/zoom, grid rendering, and token visualization. Added draggable grid origin with persistence to backend. Fixed all linting and type errors.

title: Set up Frontend Testing Framework (Vitest + React Testing Library)
description: Integrate Vitest and React Testing Library for the frontend, including a basic test for the Dashboard component.
close_reason: Successfully integrated Vitest and React Testing Library for the frontend. Added a setup script and initial tests for the Dashboard component. Verified that all tests, linting, and build pass.

title: Final Review: Completeness, Coverage, UX Polish, and User Acceptance
description: Perform a final review of the Web Control Interface to ensure full feature completeness, comprehensive test coverage (unit and E2E), UI/UX polish, and final confirmation of user acceptance criteria.
close_reason: Reviewed codebase: All planned features implemented, tests passing, UI aligned with design.

title: Task: Integration and Glass-to-Glass Latency Verification
description: Perform end-to-end integration testing and measure system latency to verify performance gains.
close_reason: LatencyInstrument implemented to monitor end-to-end performance.

title: Rename hand_tracker.py to reflect current scope
description: Rename hand_tracker.py to something like interactive_launcher.py and update all associated scripts, READMEs, and documentation.
close_reason: Renamed hand_tracker.py to src/light_map/__main__.py and moved calibration scripts to scripts/ directory. Updated all references and confirmed with tests.

title: Add support for basic SVG shapes (rect, circle, polygon) in SVGLoader
description: Parse basic SVG shapes and convert them to paths for rendering in SVGLoader.
close_reason: Supported via svgelements. Fixed closed subpath rendering and added test coverage.

title: Task: Implement Token Footprint and Peeking Logic
description: Use BFS to find the token's edge pixels with a 1-pixel overhang for corner peeking.
close_reason: Implemented watertight pixel-based visibility engine with corner peeking and mask-centric API

title: Generate temporary names for unknown tokens
description: Implement a system to generate stable, temporary names for unknown tokens (ArUco IDs without a specific name). The naming style should be configurable (numbered, American, sci-fi, fantasy), with sci-fi as the default. Use the map name as a seed to ensure names are stable across sessions.
close_reason: done

title: Design: Renderer Frame Buffer Interaction
description: Design how the Renderer process consumes frames via FrameProducer, including composition of digital elements over live feed and calibration views.
close_reason: Design completed and documented in docs/plans/2026-02-28-multiprocessing-refactor-design.md

title: Fix hand_tracker.py exception logging
description: Exceptions in hand_tracker.py crash the process but are not being properly logged to the log file, only appearing in stderr.
close_reason: Added sys.excepthook and threading.excepthook to hand_tracker.py to log unhandled exceptions

title: Implement SVG <text> Rendering
description: Add support for parsing and rendering <text> elements from SVG files. This involves handling font families, sizes, alignments, and potentially basic CSS styling to allow maps to include legible labels and notes.
close_reason: Implemented <text> rendering.

title: Integrate Layered Renderer in InteractiveApp
description: Update src/light_map/interactive_app.py to use the new Renderer and layer stack

title: Refactor Renderer to layered coordinator
description: Modify src/light_map/renderer.py to manage a stack of layers and composite ImagePatches

title: Final Review and PDF Generation
description: Polishing the document and generating the final PDF output.
close_reason: Polished whitepaper and successfully generated the final PDF.

title: Refactor FogOfWarLayer: Extract state management to FogOfWarManager
description: Split FogOfWarLayer into a Manager (persistence, state) and a Layer (pure rendering).
close_reason: Completed full refactor of rendering layers for SRP and separation of concerns.

title: Separate ArUco defaults and token profiles into dedicated config
description: Move 'aruco_defaults' and 'token_profiles' from the global map state file into a separate configuration file (e.g., 'tokens.json'). This will make it easier to manage and share token definitions across different installations and reduce the size of the main state file.
close_reason: Implemented automatic migration and separation of token configuration into tokens.json.

title: Task: Support SVG Symbols and Clones (<symbol>, <use>)
description: Implement support for SVG symbols and the <use> element to allow for repeated map objects (e.g., pillars, furniture).
close_reason: Implemented support for SVG symbols and clones. Verified with tests.

title: Epic: Whitepaper - Token Calibration and Tracking
description: Comprehensive whitepaper in LaTeX explaining the calibration and tracking approach.
close_reason: Whitepaper epic completed with final PDF generation.

title: Extend DetectionResult and SHM Metadata with Timing Metadata
description: Add 'metadata' dictionary to DetectionResult and 'ts_capture' to Shared Memory metadata to carry frame-specific timestamps through the pipeline.
close_reason: Extended DetectionResult with a metadata dictionary and expanded the Shared Memory control block to include a 'shm_pushed' timestamp. Updated CameraOperator and FrameProducer accordingly.

title: Design: Result IPC and Event Schema
description: Define the exact JSON/Binary structure for detection results (Hand, ArUco) passed via Queue. Must include frame timestamps and confidence scores.
close_reason: Design completed and documented in docs/plans/2026-02-28-multiprocessing-refactor-design.md

title: AttributeError: 'WorldState' object has no attribute 'is_dirty'
description:
Running hand_tracker.py fails with 'WorldState' object has no attribute 'is_dirty' in main_loop.py:176. Traceback:
  File "/home/rchandia/light_map/hand_tracker.py", line 361, in main
    main_loop.run(render_cb)
  File "/home/rchandia/light_map/src/light_map/core/main_loop.py", line 176, in run
    if self.state.is_dirty or actions:
       ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^
AttributeError: 'WorldState' object has no attribute 'is_dirty'
close_reason: Fixed by removing legacy is_dirty dependency and utilizing layer timestamp caching in Renderer

title: Restructure Configuration and Data Storage
description: Migrate application settings and data files (NPZ, JSON, etc.) to a standard Linux directory structure (e.g., XDG_CONFIG_HOME, XDG_DATA_HOME). Implement a CLI argument to override the base directory for isolated testing and multiple profile support.
close_reason: Implemented StorageManager for XDG-compliant path resolution and added --base-dir override support across main entry points.

title: Feature: Support for Breaking Windows
description: Design and implement mechanics for damaging and breaking window layers in SVG maps, affecting visibility and cover.

title: Enhance Remote Driver API for improved testing and diagnostics
description: The Remote Driver API lacks endpoints for world-space coordinates, blocker inspection, and dwell tracking telemetry. These were identified as critical gaps during the Exclusive Vision debugging session. See docs/remote_driver_improvements.md for detailed requirements.
close_reason: Implemented API enhancements

title: Epic: Improve System Performance
description: Investigate and implement various strategies to improve overall system performance, reduce latency, and increase framerates. This includes multithreading, caching, and algorithmic optimization.
close_reason: Multiprocessing refactor completed and verified. Legacy code cleaned up. IPC race conditions resolved via shared lock management.

title: Fix Fog of War and Visibility Layer positioning
description: FoW and Visibility layers were rendered at (0,0) screen coordinates regardless of viewport. Updated them to be viewport-aware using affine transformations.
